name: InstantDB
pricing_notes: Free tier (10k rows, 1GB storage); Pro $25/mo; Team $100/mo

auth.notes: App key for SDK; user auth via magic link, Google OAuth, or custom

performance.notes: Optimistic UI updates are instant; server sync ~50ms; WebSocket real-time subscriptions

agent_readiness.notes: Real-time database with Datalog query language. Firebase alternative with relational queries and multiplayer capabilities. useQuery React hook for live data. Transactions. Permissions system. TypeScript schema with type inference. Built-in user auth. Offline support with optimistic updates. Backend-as-a-Service for real-time collaborative apps.

gotchas: Datalog query language different from SQL — learning curve
Newer service — less proven at enterprise scale than Firebase
No SQL interface — must use InstantDB query API
Free tier limits may be restrictive for production
best_when: Firebase alternatives with better relational query capabilities
React apps needing multiplayer features with minimal backend
Rapid prototyping with full-stack auth + real-time data
avoid_when: Enterprise scale without proven track record
summary: InstantDB is a real-time database (Firebase alternative) with Datalog queries, built-in auth, and optimistic UI updates. React hooks for live data subscriptions. Multiplayer support for collaborative apps. TypeScript schema with full type inference. Best for real-time collaborative applications needing relational queries beyond what Firebase offers.
